heroHeadline: Trump Orders 'Shoot & Kill' for Iranian Mine-Layers; Araghchi Delivers War-End Demands in Islamabad — Day 57
heroSubtitle: Iranian FM Araghchi delivered Tehran's formal war-end demands to Pakistani officials on April 25 as US envoys Witkoff and Kushner traveled for talks — the most active diplomatic moment since the ceasefire began. Trump escalated simultaneously with a 'shoot and kill' order for Iranian mine-laying boats, sending WTI crude back to $95–97/bbl after it had fallen to $87–91 following the April 22 ceasefire extension. S&P 500 hit a new record of 7,165.08 on April 24. Trump attended the White House Correspondents' Dinner — his first as a sitting president. ICE arrest rates fell nearly 12% from their peak following Minneapolis killings of two US citizens. Speaker Johnson unveiled a third FISA 702 reauthorization plan before the April 30 expiry. FOMC meeting scheduled April 28–29.
footerNote: Aggregated intelligence from all US-based Watchboard trackers.
